title: Calculate miles based on an address form from a static start point
excerpt: Would love the ability to have a static “home” address and then use an address in a different column to calculate the miles from point a to point b.  a direct tie in to google maps would be AMAZING!!!

posts.author: SAVE22Veterans (SAVE22Veterans)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love the ability to have a static “home” address and then use an address in a different column to calculate the miles from point a to point b. a direct tie in to google maps would be AMAZING!!!
